data.content: The beat-create hook now always schedules scope refinement at src/app/api/beats/route.ts:85-91, but the settings defaults and agent resolution make that path execute a real agent even when the user never configured scope refinement. See src/lib/schemas.ts:153-160 and src/lib/settings.ts:529-533 plus src/lib/settings.ts:598-615. There is also no direct route/integration test covering enqueue-on-create behavior.
